blocks.text: This book gathers guide chapters from the mods you have loaded. A chapter appears only when its mod is present, so your Almanac always matches your modlist.

items: Press Alt+J to open the book.
Pick a mod from the contents to read its chapter.
Use Back to return, or Contents to come home.

blocks.text: Every mod you have loaded is listed below. The ones with a guide are links. The rest have no chapter yet.
Write a chapter as plain JSON and ship it in your own mod. The format is documented in the repository. The book owns layout, fonts, and gating. You bring the content.
Keep chapters short. A reader opens the book mid-task and wants the one thing they came for, not an essay.
See what a chapter can hold.
